description: Example segment built from a unified DMO

models.name: UnifiedCustomers
models.sql: SELECT ui.ssot__Id__c FROM UnifiedssotIndividualMain__dlm ui JOIN ssot__SalesOrder__dlm so ON ui.ssot__Id__c = so.ssot__IndividualId__c GROUP BY ui.ssot__Id__c HAVING SUM(so.ssot__TotalAmount__c) > 1000
